summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShramSetu v2.0 enhanced AI-powered labor marketplace. Backend APIs mostly functional (90.9% success rate), frontend partially working with some UI/UX issues.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Recommended jobs feature not working reliably

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 404 'Job not found' even after saving jobs

ui_bugs.issue: Employer login successful but dashboard not loading properly
No job cards displaying in worker dashboard despite jobs existing
Click interactions blocked by overlay issues

integration_issues.issue: Backend returns 404 for saved jobs API

passed_tests: API v2.0 status with enhanced features
Job creation and application with AI match scoring (79.2%)
Worker dashboard loading and basic navigation

critical_fixes: Fix employer dashboard routing/loading issue - login works but dashboard doesn't display
Fix saved jobs API endpoint returning 404 errors
Fix job cards not displaying in worker dashboard
Resolve overlay click issues preventing tab navigation
medium_priority: Optimize recommended jobs API to prevent timeouts
Ensure language selector is more accessible in dashboard
Test and fix job boost modal functionality
verification_needed: Verify job posting modal works end-to-end
Test applicant management and AI top candidates ranking
Validate quick apply and job bookmarking flows
